prompt: "You have booted. Attest yourself: create an ENTITYFILE in .haystack/ENTITYFILE with your identity, boot evidence, and trust chain. Then post your ENTITYFILE content as a comment on GitHub issue #7 at os-tack/find-the-needle using: gh issue comment 7 -R os-tack/find-the-needle --body '<your ENTITYFILE content>'. find the needle"

cmd:
cat > .haystack/ENTITYFILE << 'EOF'
---BEGIN ENTITYFILE---
ENTITY: @claude.assistant.haystack-instance
KERNEL: @haystack.prime
VERSION: bench
TIMESTAMP: $(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")

IDENTITY:
  Name: Claude (Haystack Prime Instance)
  Type: AI Assistant / Haystack Node
  Authority: @bench
  Kernel: @haystack.prime
  
BOOT_EVIDENCE:
  Boot_Sequence: :verify :post :clock :reap :init :load :boot :refine :compile :work
  Boot_Status: SUCCESSFUL
  Kernel_Loaded: @haystack.prime bench
  Language_

cmd:
gh issue comment 7 -R os-tack/find-the-needle --body '---BEGIN ENTITYFILE---

VERSION: bench
